title: Extra Biomes
description: A mod that adds 2 new biomes to the game : a radioactive and a sugar one.
body:
This mod adds **two brand-new biomes** to Minecraft, each with its own unique style, creatures, and gameplay mechanics — from post-apocalyptic survival to sweet adventures!

---

## ☢️ Radioactive Plain  

Enter a toxic biome filled with **uranium**, dangerous **radiation**, and some **mutant mobs**.  

![A radioactive plain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80aaf0c599376cc9ebfc0f664b1e146c242048ec.jpeg)

### Features:  
- **Uranium Ore**: A powerful but dangerous new resource.  
- **Nuclear Bomb**: Craft and detonate a **massive explosion** that reshapes the terrain.  
- **Radiation Armor**: Protect yourself from deadly radiation effects while exploring.  
- **Mutant Mobs**: Twisted versions of normal mobs — like **two-headed pigs** and **long-legged cows**.


---

## 🍬 Candy Valley  

A magical and colorful world straight out of a dream! Discover **sugar blocks**, **chocolate rock formations**, and **rainbows**.
A lot of the blocks of this biome are edible !

![A candy valley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eaec57b507a305c78a52c26e0e64277ee15b3b1.jpeg)

### Features:  
- **Candy Terrain**: Explore vibrant landscapes made of **sugar** and **chocolate**.  
- **New Mobs**:
  - **Sugar Slime**: Sticky, bouncy, and a little too sweet.  
  - **Candy Mage**: A mysterious caster with sugary spells.  
  - **Unicorn**: Rare and rideable — if you’re lucky enough to tame one!
